title: ecbolium balfourii
intro: Ecbolium balfourii, also known as the Balfour's ecbolium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to the western Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and improving digestion. Ecbolium balfourii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
